sources.expression:
$wpdb->get_results( $wpdb->prepare( "SELECT ID, post_parent, post_title FROM $wpdb->posts 
			WHERE post_parent = %d 
			AND post_type = '".$post->post_type."' 
			AND post_status = 'publish' 
			ORDER BY menu_order", $parent ) )

sinks.expression: header('Last-Modified: '.gmdate('D, d M Y H:i:s', $filetime).' GMT', true, 304)
header('Last-Modified: '.gmdate('D, d M Y H:i:s', $filetime).' GMT', true, 200)
wp_die('You don\'t have access to clone this post.')
wp_die('Post creation failed, could not find original post: ' . $post_id)
header('Last-Modified: '.gmdate('D, d M Y H:i:s', $filetime).' GMT', true, 304)
header('Last-Modified: '.gmdate('D, d M Y H:i:s', $filetime).' GMT', true, 200)
wp_send_json_error(array('message' => __('You do not have permission to install plugins.', 'pagelayer')))
wp_send_json_error(array('message' => __('Could not initialize filesystem. Please check file permissions.', 'pagelayer')))
wp_send_json_error(array('message' => __('Plugin installed but could not be located for activation.', 'pagelayer')))
wp_send_json_error(array('message' => __('You do not have permission to activate plugins.', 'pagelayer')))
wp_send_json_error(__('You do not have required access to do this action', 'pagelayer'))
wp_send_json_error('You don\'t have privilege to close this notice!')

array_filter([
					isset($include['category']) ? [
						'taxonomy' => 'category',
						'field'    => 'slug',
						'terms'    => $include['category'],
						'include_children' => false,
					] : null,
					isset($include['post_tag']) ? [
						'taxonomy' => 'post_tag',
						'field'    => 'slug',
						'terms'    => $include['post_tag'],
						'include_children' => false,
					] : null,
				])

array_filter([
					isset($include['category']) ? [
						'taxonomy' => 'category',
						'field'    => 'slug',
						'terms'    => $include['category'],
						'operator' => 'NOT IN',
						'include_children' => false,
					] : null,
					isset($include['post_tag']) ? [
						'taxonomy' => 'post_tag',
						'field'    => 'slug',
						'terms'    => $include['post_tag'],
						'operator' => 'NOT IN',
						'include_children' => false,
					] : null,
				])

$wpdb->get_results( $wpdb->prepare( "SELECT ID, post_parent, post_title FROM $wpdb->posts 
			WHERE post_parent = %d 
			AND post_type = '".$post->post_type."' 
			AND post_status = 'publish' 
			ORDER BY menu_order", $parent ) )
wp_die( __( 'Sorry, you are not allowed to edit this item.' ) )
wp_die(esc_html__('You do not have permission to upload files.', 'pagelayer'))
wp_die(esc_html__('You do not have permission to edit this attachment.', 'pagelayer'))
wp_die(esc_html__('You do not have permission to edit this attachment.', 'pagelayer'))

$wpdb->prepare( "SELECT ID, post_parent, post_title FROM $wpdb->posts 
			WHERE post_parent = %d 
			AND post_type = '".$post->post_type."' 
			AND post_status = 'publish' 
			ORDER BY menu_order", $parent )
esc_html(__('Set the custom width of the content area. The default width set is 1170px.'))
esc_html(__('Set the breakpoint for tablet devices. The default breakpoint for tablet layout is 768px.'))
esc_html(__('Set the breakpoint for mobile devices. The default breakpoint for mobile layout is 480px.'))
esc_html(__('Set the Space Between Widgets. The default Space set is 15px.'))

esc_html(__('By default, the themes sidebar will be shown. But you can customize the settings here as per your preference. Note : This will work only if your theme uses the get_sidebar() function. Also the main content element and sidebar element should be siblings. If they are not siblings, then only the No Sidebar option will be usable.'))
esc_html(__('Default layout for the Sidebar throughout the site.'))
esc_html(__('Sidebar layout specifically for static pages.'))
esc_html(__('Sidebar layout specifically for blog posts.'))
esc_html(__('Set the width of the sidebar (in percentage).'))
esc_html(__('Header, Body and Footer Custom Code'))
esc_html(__('You can add custom code like HTML, JavaScript, CSS etc. which will be inserted throughout your site.'))
esc_html(__('This code will be inserted inside the <head> section.'))
esc_html(__('This code will be printed at the beginning of the <body> section.'))
esc_html(__('This code will be printed before the closing </body> section.'))
